concepts.name: Armour
concepts.cap: No hard cap — diminishing returns apply naturally
key_facts: 10,000 armour gives 50% reduction vs a 1,000 damage hit
10,000 armour gives only 10% reduction vs a 100,000 damage hit
Most effective against many small hits (minions, ground effects, map mods)
Physical DoTs (Bleeds) are NOT mitigated by armour — use physical damage reduction % instead
concepts.how_to_stack: Armour % on gear + Determination aura + Iron Reflexes keystone (converts Evasion to Armour)
concepts.active_skill: Molten Shell (guard skill that scales with armour for an absorb shield)
concepts.notes: Armour alone is rarely enough for endgame — pair with flat % PDR or life leech.

concepts.name: Evasion
key_facts: Chance-based: each hit is independently rolled — unlucky streaks can kill you
Blind debuff on enemies halves their accuracy, greatly improving evasion
Evasion does not mitigate hits that land — one unlucky hit at full damage
Acrobatics/Phase Acrobatics doubles evasion effectiveness vs hits and spells
concepts.how_to_stack: Evasion % on gear + Grace aura + Acrobatics keystone + Haste for base evasion
concepts.active_skill: Smoke Mine or Blind support to apply Blind consistently
concepts.notes: Pair with a reliable life recovery method — evasion offers no recovery.

concepts.name: Energy Shield
concepts.formula: ES absorbs all damage before life (except Chaos if not CI)
concepts.cap: No cap on ES pool size
key_facts: ES recharge begins 2 seconds after last taking a hit
ES recharges at ~33% of max ES per second once started
Chaos Injury bypasses ES unless using Chaos Inoculation keystone
ES gates at 1 life — at low life threshold builds can use Petrified Blood
Zealot's Oath makes life regeneration apply to ES instead of life
concepts.how_to_stack: ES % on gear + Discipline aura + Zealot's Oath + Chaos Inoculation keystone
concepts.active_skill: Vaal Discipline for emergency ES refill in a pinch
concepts.notes: Strong against burst but punished by chaos damage and degens. CI removes chaos weakness.

concepts.name: Elemental Resistances
concepts.cap: 75% default maximum; up to 90% with raised maximum resistance
key_facts: Default cap: 75% for each of Fire, Cold, and Lightning
Act 5 Kitava kill: −30% to all resistances permanently
Act 10 Kitava kill: another −30% (total −60% without gear)
Purity of Fire/Ice/Lightning auras raise the cap for their element by up to +4%
Elemental Weakness curse reduces resistance by 50%; Flammability by 44%
concepts.how_to_stack: Resist mods on gear + Purity auras + Resist flasks (Topaz/Sapphire/Ruby)
concepts.active_skill: Granite Flask (armour) or Quartz Flask (phasing) for physical layering
concepts.notes: Always cap resistances (75%) before optimizing other defences.

concepts.name: Chaos Resistance
key_facts: Default is −60% chaos resistance at character creation
Chaos damage bypasses Energy Shield unless using Chaos Inoculation
Many endgame bosses (Sirus, Maven, Uber Elder) deal heavy chaos damage
Chaos Inoculation sets max life to 1 and grants immunity to chaos damage
concepts.how_to_stack: Chaos resistance on gear + Purity of Elements aura (raises all res caps)
concepts.active_skill: Jade Flask with Seething/Bubbling prefix for emergency life recovery vs chaos
concepts.notes: Aim for at least 0% chaos res for yellow maps; +20% for red maps/bosses.

concepts.name: Physical Damage Reduction %
concepts.formula: Additive with itself; applied after armour reduction
concepts.cap: 90% combined physical damage reduction (from all sources)
key_facts: Endurance Charges grant 4% PDR each (up to 16% at 4 charges)
Immortal Call consumes Endurance Charges for brief physical immunity
Basalt Flask grants 15% PDR while active
Fortify (from Melee Hits) grants 20% less damage from hits
concepts.how_to_stack: Endurance Charges + Immortal Call guard skill + Fortify support or mastery
concepts.active_skill: Immortal Call — brief immunity to physical + elemental damage per Endurance Charge
concepts.notes: PDR % is the most reliable physical defence against large one-shot hits.

concepts.name: Spell Suppression
concepts.formula: When triggered, spell damage reduced by 50%
concepts.cap: 100% chance to suppress (suppression triggers on every spell hit)
key_facts: Requires Evasion-based gear to roll Spell Suppression on items
At 100% suppression: every spell hit deals only 50% of its damage
Does not interact with Evasion — spells always hit if not blocked/dodged
Requires significant passive and gear investment to reach 100%
concepts.how_to_stack: Evasion gear with Suppression suffix + Passive tree clusters (Ranger/Shadow) + Ascendancy nodes
concepts.active_skill: Jade Flask for Evasion scaling to complement suppression layers
concepts.notes: At 100% suppression, spell damage is halved — very strong against spell-heavy bosses.

concepts.name: Block
concepts.formula: Flat % chance to block — blocked hits deal 0 damage
concepts.cap: 75% attack block / 75% spell block (both have separate caps)
key_facts: Shields provide base block chance; staves can block attacks
Blocked hits deal 0 damage (no partial mitigation)
Spell Block is separate from Attack Block and typically requires passives
Rumi's Concoction flask: +20% attack block and +10% spell block while active
Corrupted soul / The Anvil unique amulet can grant passive spell block
concepts.how_to_stack: Shield with high base block + passive block nodes + Rumi's Concoction
concepts.active_skill: Bone Offering (summoners) for reliable block chance without a shield
concepts.notes: Block is binary — 0 damage on a blocked hit. Extremely powerful if capped.

concepts.name: Life (as Defence)
key_facts: More life = more ability to survive one-shots and recover
Target: 4,000+ life for yellow maps; 5,000+ for red maps; 6,000+ for endgame
Life regeneration and leech sustain life during combat
Low Life threshold (35%) enables mods from Pain Attunement / some uniques
concepts.how_to_stack: Life on all gear slots (except weapon/quiver) + %Life passives + Vitality aura
concepts.active_skill: Steelskin guard skill for a flat absorb shield based on gem level
concepts.notes: Life is the foundation all other defences build on. Never neglect it.

concepts.name: Guard Skills
concepts.formula: Absorb shield that blocks damage; consumed before life/ES
key_facts: Steelskin: 500–3,600 flat HP shield (scales with gem level); 3s base cooldown
Molten Shell: shield scales with your armour (up to 10,000+); 3s base cooldown
Immortal Call: brief (0.4–1.5s) physical immunity + 9% per Endurance Charge; 3s base cooldown
All three benefit from Arcanist Brand or CWDT for automation
Only one guard skill can be active at a time
concepts.how_to_stack: Use CWDT (Cast When Damage Taken) to trigger automatically
concepts.active_skill: Choose based on build: Steelskin (any), Molten Shell (high armour), Immortal Call (tanky melee)
concepts.notes: CWDT + Immortal Call is a classic setup. Molten Shell is best for 10k+ armour builds.

concepts.name: Leech & Regeneration
concepts.formula: Leech: % of damage dealt returned as life over 1 second per instance
concepts.cap: Maximum leech rate: 20% of max life per second (default)
key_facts: Leech requires hitting enemies — useless in no-hit builds or DoT without hit component
Life Regeneration is passive and unconditional
Vitality aura provides flat life regen per second
Flasks provide burst recovery: Seething = instant 50%, Bubbling = 50% over 3s
Corrupted Blood flask immunity (mod or jewel) is essential in endgame
concepts.how_to_stack: Leech passives + Vitality aura + life flask with Seething prefix
concepts.active_skill: Life flask with Seething prefix for instant emergency recovery
concepts.notes: Against DoT damage, leech does not help. Use regen or instant life flasks instead.

concepts.name: Effective Hit Points (EHP)
key_facts: EHP represents the raw damage input required to kill you, accounting for all mitigation
Example: 5,000 life + 75% resistance = 5,000 ÷ 0.25 = 20,000 EHP vs that element
Layering mitigation types multiplies EHP: armour × PDR% × resistance
Block and evasion are probabilistic — they increase average EHP but not reliable EHP
One-shot protection requires both high EHP and defences that work on large hits
concepts.how_to_stack: High life + capped resistances + PDR % + guard skills for burst
concepts.active_skill: Any guard skill provides on-demand temporary EHP boost
concepts.notes: A single 75% resist cap is already a 4× EHP multiplier vs that element. Cap resists first.

tips: Priority order: Life (4k+) → Capped Resistances (75%) → Chaos Res (≥0%) → One-shot protection → Sustain.
The -60% resistance penalty from both Kitava kills means you need ~135% on gear to cap all resists.
Stacking two different defence types (e.g., armour + block) multiplies your effective survivability.
Use the PoB (Path of Building) EHP calculator to compare defence layers objectively.
Boss fights test burst defence; mapping tests sustain. Gear and gem setups often differ.
